businessQuestion: Which products generated the highest estimated lost revenue due to stockouts?
sqlAnswer:
SELECT
    DP.CATEGORY,
    DP.PRODUCT_NAME,
    SUM(SE.LOST_UNITS_ESTIMATED) AS LOST_UNITS,
    SUM(SE.LOST_REVENUE_ESTIMATED) AS LOST_REVENUE,
    SUM(SE.LOST_MARGIN_ESTIMATED) AS LOST_MARGIN
FROM CONVERSA_DEMO.CLOTHING_RETAIL.FACT_STOCKOUT_EVENT SE
JOIN CONVERSA_DEMO.CLOTHING_RETAIL.DIM_PRODUCT DP
    ON SE.PRODUCT_KEY = DP.PRODUCT_KEY
GROUP BY
    DP.CATEGORY,
    DP.PRODUCT_NAME
ORDER BY LOST_REVENUE DESC;
businessContext: Supply chain teams want to prioritize replenishment for products causing the largest revenue loss.
